display.purpose: Power-on wordmark and hero lockup only. Michroma, rare and large.

title.purpose: Panel and section nameplates. The only other place Michroma appears.

body.purpose: Base readout text, status lines, preset names. IBM Plex Mono.

label.purpose: Knob labels, units, sub-labels. Tiny tracked uppercase mono.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: The gentle seat of a module panel: inner top highlight plus soft drop.

shadows.name: arc-glow
shadows.purpose: Colored bloom on a knob's live value arc; uses the section accent.

shadows.name: led-bloom
shadows.purpose: An active status LED, in the section accent.

shadows.name: socket-inset
shadows.purpose: Recessed seat of an unlit LED.

motion.name: ease-quick
motion.purpose: Border, color and value-reveal transitions on controls.

motion.name: ease-tactile
motion.purpose: Knob body and background shifts on hover/drag.

motion.name: ease-glow
motion.purpose: Box-shadow / glow fade on state change.

motion.name: power-pulse
motion.purpose: Radiating ring pulse from the power button on activation.

breakpoints.name: rack
breakpoints.value: fixed logical grid scaled to fit; the rack keeps proportions rather than reflowing.

components.name: Knob
components.description: Signature rotary control: machined body, glowing accent value arc, white pointer, hover-revealed value.
components.html: 0.42CUTOFF
components.css: .ds-knob { display:inline-flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:1px; cursor:ns-resize; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; } .ds-knob svg { overflow:visible; } .ds-k-body { fill:#161b25; stroke:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); stroke-width:1.5; transition:fill 0.2s; } .ds-knob:hover .ds-k-body { fill:#1b2130; } .ds-k-track { fill:none; stroke:rgba(255,255,255,0.09); stroke-width:5; stroke-linecap:round; } .ds-k-arc { fill:none; stroke:var(--ac); stroke-width:5; stroke-linecap:round; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ac) 70%, transparent)); } .ds-k-ptr { stroke:#e8edf7; stroke-width:4; stroke-linecap:round; } .ds-k-label { font-size:8px; letter-spacing:0.16em; color:#6b768c; margin-top:3px; text-transform:uppercase; } .ds-k-value { font-size:9px; color:#dfe6f3; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.15s; height:11px; } .ds-knob:hover .ds-k-value { opacity:1; }

components.name: Stepper
components.description: Enum selector with minus/plus buttons and an accent value pill.
components.css: .ds-stepper { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; --ac:#4de8ff; } .ds-st-label { font-size:8px; color:#6b768c; letter-spacing:0.14em; margin-right:2px; } .ds-st-btn { width:18px; height:18px; padding:0; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:4px; background:#11141c; color:#6b768c; font-size:9px; cursor:pointer; line-height:1; transition:color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-st-btn:hover { color:var(--ac); border-color:var(--ac); } .ds-st-value { min-width:52px; text-align:center; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:var(--ac); background:#0a0d13; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:4px; padding:3px 6px; }

components.name: Module Panel
components.description: A rack module: gradient body, hairline border, nameplate header, panel-lift shadow.
components.css: .ds-panel { border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:12px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#181c26,#0d1017); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05), 0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.45); padding:14px; color:#dfe6f3; } .ds-panel-title { font-family:Michroma,'Avenir Next',sans-serif; font-size:17px; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#dfe6f3; margin:0 0 10px; } .ds-panel-body { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; color:#6b768c; }

components.name: Display Well
components.description: Recessed visualization box for scopes, the 3D wavetable terrain, spectrum and curves.
components.css: .ds-well { border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:9px; background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.02), transparent 30%), #07090e; padding:0; overflow:hidden; line-height:0; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Utility button: hairline border, dim text, accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.12em; color:#dfe6f3; background:#0d1017; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:6px; padding:6px 10px; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color:#4de8ff; border-color:#4de8ff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:1px solid #4de8ff; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Status LED
components.description: 8px status dot: dim recessed socket when off, accent fill with bloom when on.
components.css: .ds-led { display:inline-block; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:9999px; background:#11141c; box-shadow:inset 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.7); } .ds-led-on { background:#4de8ff; box-shadow:0 0 8px #4de8ff; }

narrative.overview: FableSynth is a dark studio console seen in a low-lit room, an instrument lit by its own signal. The chassis is near-black machined metal washed by a single cold radial glow; the only color comes from powered elements, the way a real desk only lights up where current flows. Cyan, amber and violet are voltage made visible: osc A, osc B and the filter each carry a fixed hue so your eye tracks signal flow without reading a label. Density is deliberate and high, for someone in flow, not a marketing surface. Depth is hybrid: base surfaces are flat and tonal, while the controls you actually touch carry the tactile shadow and glow that invite the hand.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black blue-black chassis lit by one cold radial glow.
Three fixed signal hues (cyan / amber / violet) that mean osc A / osc B / filter.
Two type voices: Michroma nameplates, IBM Plex Mono readouts, tracked caps.
High, deliberate density; exact grids; no wasted space.
Hybrid depth: flat tonal surfaces, tactile glowing controls.

rules.name: The Signal-Color Rule
rules.body: A saturated hue must mean something. Cyan = osc A, amber = osc B, violet = filter, slate = neutral sections. Never apply a signal color decoratively, and never let two sections claim the same hue.

rules.name: The No Pure Black Rule
rules.body: The darkest surface is #06070b, a tinted blue-black. Pure #000 and pure #fff are forbidden; even the pointer is #e8edf7.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Michroma for nameplates, IBM Plex Mono for everything else. A third typeface is forbidden. Hierarchy comes from size, tracking and case.

rules.name: The Tracked-Caps Rule
rules.body: Labels are uppercase with positive letter-spacing (0.14em and up). Lowercase label text reads as web-app, not instrument.

rules.name: The Glow-Means-On Rule
rules.body: A colored glow signals energized state (powered, active, focused), never decoration. An idle control does not glow.

dos: Do keep the chassis blue-black (#06070b) lit by a single cold radial glow; surfaces tonal and flat.
Do reserve each saturated hue for its signal: cyan = osc A, amber = osc B, violet = filter, slate = neutral sections.
Do set all labels in tracked uppercase IBM Plex Mono (+0.14em or more); Michroma only for nameplates.
Do spend depth on operated controls: radial knob bodies, glowing value arcs, recessed value wells, blooming LEDs.
Do glow only to signal an energized state.
Do keep density high and grids exact; this is an instrument for someone in flow.
donts: Don't ship skeuomorphic hardware: no woodgrain, brushed-metal photos, fake screws or beveled rack ears.
Don't drift toward a generic dark SaaS dashboard: no rounded card grids, no Inter, no single-blue admin accent, no oceans of empty padding.
Don't let it look like a flat unstyled Web Audio demo: no default browser range inputs, no identity-free controls.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe as an accent; use the full hairline, a tint, or the section accent on the control itself.
Don't introduce a third typeface or a fourth saturated hue.
Don't use pure #000 or #fff, anywhere, ever.
Don't glow decoratively; an idle control is dark.
